-- 3. Insert variable for procedure 1011 (Find Fee Rate Addon - Genome Sequencing)
-- Variable: cut_age, LUTPTID = 84

-- Only insert if not already present for LUTPTID = 84 and VariableName = 'cut_age'
INSERT INTO LUT_PricerTypeVariable (LUTPTID, SEQ, VariableName, VariableDescr, VariableType, VariableLeftCount, VariableRightCount, VariableFormat, LabelOnUI, DefaultValue, VariableSizeInC, StartPositionInC, Enabled)
